title: CARB Approves Amendments to Clean Truck Standards to Provide Flexibility While Maintaining Emissions Benefits
content: The California Air Resources Board (CARB) approved amendments to the stateâ€™s Advanced Clean Truck (ACT) and Zero-Emission Powertrain (ZEP) Certification standards to maintain the emissions benefits while providing manufacturers additional flexibility. The Boardâ€™s actions also support commitments made in the Clean Truck Partnership, an agreement with the nationâ€™s leading major truck manufacturers to reduce emissions from the trucking industry.
author: Analysts Account
